title: Claude FM 🎵 music for thinking and building
summary: Claude FM is a music streaming service made and curated by musicians, designed specifically to support thinking and building work. It is positioned as a productivity tool for developers and creators.
writeup: Claude FM is a music streaming service made and curated by musicians, designed to support thinking and building work. The video positions it as a productivity tool aimed at developers and creators. The takeaway: a curated, music-focused offering oriented around focus during technical and creative tasks.
